description: Machine-readable CUCoreLib web docs generated from the interactive docs sources.

topics.label: Welcome
topics.title: Welcome to CUCoreLib
topics.lead: A Casualties Unknown modding library for content registration, runtime helpers, and patch-safe integration points.

topics.label: Player
topics.title: Player
topics.lead: Reference for the vanilla Body player fields you will usually read or modify from mods, plus a few CUCoreLib helpers for accessing them safely.

topics.label: Statuses
topics.title: Statuses
topics.lead: Planned documentation for status effects and their gameplay hooks.

topics.label: Moodles

topics.lead: Planned documentation for moodle display and player condition indicators.

topics.label: Building Entities
topics.title: BuildingEntity API
topics.lead: Register sprite-backed world objects with placement rules, custom scripts, drops, and optional world generation.

topics.label: Advanced Buildings
topics.title: Advanced BuildingEntity API
topics.lead: Advanced building prefab hooks, worldgen details, loot crate patterns, and minigame-driven buildings.

topics.label: Minigames

topics.lead: Shared helpers for creating custom minigames on top of the game's vanilla Minigame base.

topics.label: Tiles

topics.lead: Register terrain tiles with stable block indices, vanilla block behavior, and normal world or Tilemap placement.

topics.label: CUCoreUtils
topics.title: CUCoreUtils
topics.lead: Small helper APIs for timing, readiness checks, PlayerPrefs accessors, world/item helpers, alerts, reflection, console bridging, keys, audio, and compression.

topics.label: Console and You
topics.title: The Console and You
topics.lead: ...and the many commands for the few~. Register development commands that can be ran via the game's console.

topics.label: Tools

topics.label: Settings API
